description: A named payload binding that references a DECLARED variant field does not fire E-TYPE-022 (§18.7 / §51.0.B.1). `<Loaded title=t …>` binds by the declared field `title`, so the named-form field check stays silent. The clean twin of e-type-022-engine-named-binding-pos.
rationale: §18.7 / §51.0.B.1 a named binding whose `field` IS a declared variant field is well-formed; E-TYPE-022 fires only on an unknown field name.
